         2: Intensity  (kW/m2)
         3: Emission  PM 2.5   (g/m2)
         4: Emission   PM 10   (g/m2)
         5: Emission     CH4   (g/m2)
         6: Emission     CO2   (g/m2)
         7: Emission      CO   (g/m2)
         8: Emission     NOX   (g/m2)
         9: Emission     SO2   (g/m2)
        10: Flaming Weight     (kg/m2)
        11: Smoldering Weight  (kg/m2)
        12: Flame Weight       (T/ac)
        13: Smoldering Weight  (T/ac)
